scaled_oracle_cases.description: Combined scaled oracle case verifying whitespace stripping, deduplication of transitions, early return on empty fragment annotations, and default charge handling for NA/empty values.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that mapRow simultaneously handles whitespace stripping, deduplication of transitions, early return on empty fragment annotations, and defaulting of charge state to '0' for NA/empty values.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The solution must satisfy all four new requirements: strip whitespace from peptide_name and charge_state, remove duplicates from transitions while preserving order, return early when fragment annotations are empty, and default charge to '0' when 'NA' or empty.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: A solution that handles only some requirements will produce incorrect mappings, e.g., keys with spaces, duplicate transitions, or charge 'NA' in keys.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
mapRow(row1, header_dict, precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping, protein_mapping)
mapRow(row2, header_dict, precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping, protein_mapping)
mapRow(row3, header_dict, precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping, protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)
print('Protein Mapping:', protein_mapping)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the sanitization requirement.
Scaled executable cases must expose the deduplication requirement.
Scaled executable cases must verify early return on empty transitions.
Scaled executable cases must verify default charge handling.
